name: Science Applications International Corp
business: Science Applications International Corporation provides technical, engineering, and mission and enterprise information technology services primarily to the U.S. government. The company serves all military forces and various federal agencies through approximately 1,700 active contracts and employs about 23,000 people.
sellsTo: Department of War (DoW) and military services

exposures.sentence: Artificial Intelligence ("AI"): We deploy and integrate AI solutions for customers, including AI solutions that assist with the design, deployment, and management of AI applications and allow customers to work with their complex and sensitive data to power the most demanding analytics, data science, and AI use cases.
Our experts in cybersecurity, enhanced surveillance, secure communications, mobility, and more apply core as well as emerging capabilities to address evolving mission needs.
Mission Systems Support: We design, build, modify, integrate, and sustain weapon systems across all branches of the U.S. military, ensuring mission readiness on land, at sea, and in the air.
Next Generation Space: We integrate advanced solutions to enable the rapid deployment of future space missions.

catalysts.sentence: On October 15, 2025, we acquired SilverEdge Government Solutions, an innovative provider of mission-driven technology solutions and products.

catalysts.event: Business reorganization into three business groups
catalysts.sentence: Effective January 31, 2026, the first day of fiscal 2027, we completed a business reorganization that consolidated our five business groups into three.
